subject: physics
title: 19M.1.SL.TZ1.26
question_html:
Which property of a nuclide does not change as a result of beta decay?

A. Nucleon number

B. Neutron number

C. Proton number

D. Charge
examiners_html: Response A was the most common (correct) response from a minority of candidates (38 %). Incorrect responses were evenly divided among the remaining options.
